channel.title: mbAInewsletter
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from mbAInewsletter, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Amazon is selling a performance T-shirt with over 28,100 perfect ratings for only $7
item.description: "It’s become a go-to staple in my closet."

item.title: One of Stanford’s original AI gurus says productivity liftoff has begun after doubling in 2025 amid transition to ‘harvest phase’ along J-curve
item.description: "We are transitioning from an era of AI experimentation to one of structural utility."

item.title: Why Most Retirees Struggle Without This Simple Bucket Secret
item.description: Allocate your money to short-term, mid-term and long-term goals.
